prestazioni: MAFless ECU remap via Cobb Accessport v3 with custom Stage 2+ tune for the 3.4L M96/75 (987.2) engine, targeting 380whp and 300wtq on 93 octane with a 20% ethanol blend, utilizing a custom 4-bar MAP sensor and upgraded fuel pump (Bosch 044) to support the increased flow demands

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović with 70mm dual outlets, 200-cell metallic catalytic converters, and a valved center section for backpressure optimization, paired with a custom X-pipe design to enhance scavenging on the flat-six

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 8-position rebound damping, 20mm adjustable ride height, and solid top mounts, combined with a custom sway bar setup (H&R 24mm front, 22mm rear) and spherical bearing end links (SuperPro) for chassis rigidity
estetica: RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) Porsche 987.2-specific widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders, custom front splitter, and a ducktail spoiler, finished in Porsche GT3 RS Guards Red with matte black accents and gold-painted BBS LM wheels (8.5x19 ET35 front, 11x19 ET40 rear)

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul by 911 Design, including RS60 Spyder-specific door cards, Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with red stitching, and a custom roll bar (Weissach-style) wrapped in Alcantara to match the factory RS60 seats

Custom LED taillight conversion by Diode Dynamics with sequential turn signals, smoked lenses, and integrated rear fog lights, paired with a front lip spoiler by TechArt GTstreet with integrated LED daytime running lights and a carbon fiber diffuser
